features: The Shaving Brush Set for Men contains Shaving Brush, Shaving Stand and Shaving Bowl.
Shaving Brush Set is for Beginners who has recently joined shaving club.
The Shaving Brush Set for Men gives you all the tidy solutions. Shaving Stand will hang the Shaving Razor and Shaving Brush to make it dry and increase the life span of the brush.
The Shaving Set is good for travelling purpose.
The Shaving Bowl beneath the Shaving Stand will let the water drops fell in it her and also can be used to make the Shaving Foam.
